svg.text: Strategy guide for blind boxes, plushies, Pokemon TCG, and collectibles
Optimized for Milwaukee local pickup + shipping | Post-eBay recovery plan
Use a Facebook Business Page, NOT personal profile
Separates sales from personal account. If page gets flagged, personal stays safe.
Optimize profile for kawaii niche: cover photo with product spread
Set business hours + enable instant replies (FB rewards <1hr response)
Complete About section with niche keywords
- Never claim items are "authentic" without proof of purchase
- No prohibited items: no weapons, no replicas, no bootlegs
- Ship on time or mark as local pickup only. Late shipments = strikes
Ex: "Sonny Angel Hippers Series Blind Box - NEW SEALED - 3 inch"
Bright, natural lighting (near window or ring light)
4+ photos: front, back, detail, size reference
First photo = hero shot (this is your thumbnail)
10-20% below retail, above wholesale. Check sold comps on eBay/Mercari.
for algorithm boost. Renew every 7 days.
Categories: Toys & Games, Collectibles, Trading Cards
Milwaukee is your moat. Most online sellers can't offer this.
Meet at public locations only: police stations, Mayfair Mall, libraries
Bundle deals: "Buy 3+ items, I'll meet you anywhere in MKE"
Cross-promote events: "See my full collection at [next flea market]"
Hand out business cards with Shopify URL at every pickup
Offer "first look" to repeat buyers before posting publicly
Primary: Milwaukee metro (15 min) | Secondary: Waukesha, Racine, Kenosha (30 min)
Events: Madison, Chicago suburbs (special trips, $50+ orders only)
Sync FBMP listings with flea market and comic con schedule
Post "available at [event name] this weekend" on active listings
Offer BOTH local pickup AND shipping on every listing.
This doubles your buyer pool instantly.
Flat rate shipping: $5.99 (built into listing price)
Use USPS Priority Mail for items under 1 lb (includes tracking)
Poly mailers for plushies, small boxes for blind boxes and figures
Upload tracking number SAME DAY as sale
- Tissue paper wrap (pastel colors match brand)
- Thank you card with Shopify URL + socials
- Sticker or small freebie (builds repeat buyers)
Ship within 2 business days (faster = better seller rating)
Photo items before shipping (proof against disputes)
"Pokemon TCG Mystery Pack - $15" (bulk commons + 1 holo guaranteed)
Great for moving slow inventory at a profit
"Rilakkuma Starter Pack" - plush + keychain + sticker set
"Pokemon TCG Essentials" - binder + sleeves + booster pack
Stickers, keychains, charms listed separately at $3
Put this in every listing description. Creates urgency to buy more.
Join: Wisconsin Collectibles, WI Anime & Manga
Join: Sonny Angel, Blind Box, Kawaii collector groups
Don't just sell. Show your collection. Ask questions. Be part of the community.
Post collection photos in groups (not selling, just sharing)
Comment on other people's posts genuinely
Go Live during blind box unboxings (weekly)
Share event photos and hauls from flea markets
"Live from [Comic Con]" streams build massive local following
Solo operation. Local pickup only. Build reputation and reviews.
Pricing dialed in from sold data
Add shipping. Active in 5+ buy/sell groups. Weekly FB Lives.
Funnel buyers to Shopify. Wholesale sourcing. Repeat customer base.
FBMP is acquisition channel, Shopify is the store
Views per listing (low views = bad title/photo/category)
Sell-through rate: items sold / items listed
Average sale price and profit margin per category
Evenings: 6-9 PM CT (collectors browse after work)
Weekends: 10 AM - 2 PM CT (Saturday morning browsing)
Kawaii buyers skew female 18-35. Post when they're scrolling.
behike.co x onipuni.com | Facebook Marketplace for Kawaii Vendors
Built for Randy. Milwaukee, WI. Local pickup + shipping strategy.
